languages.text: This unit fights for Trazyn. It performs a WIL save at the end of each turn to remove this effect.

traits.locale_text: This unit fights for Trazyn. It performs a WIL save at the end of each turn to remove this effect.

languages.text: This creature acts as Trazyn's ally. At the end of every one of its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g}, it must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g}. On a successful test, the effect is removed.
languages.original_text: This unit fights for Trazyn. It performs a WIL save at the end of each turn to remove this effect.

traits.locale_text: This creature acts as Trazyn's ally. At the end of its every turn it must pass a Willpower resistance test. On a successful test, the effect is removed.

languages.text: Это существо сражается на стороне Тразина. В конце каждого своего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} оно выполняет проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Воли{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g}. В случае успеха эффект снимается.

Это существо сражается на стороне Тразина. В конце каждого своего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} оно выполняет проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Воли{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g}. В случае успеха эффект снимается.

languages.text: Cette créature devient l'alliée de Trazyn. À la fin de chacun de ses {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tours{/g}, elle doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Force mentale{/g}. En cas de réussite, l'effet est supprimé.
languages.original_text: This creature acts as Trazyn's ally. At the end of every one of its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g}, it must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g}. On a successful test, the effect is removed.

traits.locale_text: Cette créature devient l'alliée de Trazyn. À la fin de chacun de ses {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tours{/g}, elle doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Force mentale{/g}. En cas de réussite, l'effet est supprimé.{g|Encyclopedia:Test}{/g}

languages.text: Bu yaratık, Trazyn'in dost birimi olarak eylemde bulunur. {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Turu{/g} her sonlandığında {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}İrade{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Testi geçerse etki ortadan kalkar.
languages.original_text: This creature acts as Trazyn's ally. At the end of every one of its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g}, it must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g}. On a successful test, the effect is removed.

traits.locale_text: Bu yaratık, Trazyn'in dost birimi olarak eylemde bulunur. {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Turu{/g} her sonlandığında {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}İrade{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. {g|Encyclopedia:Test}Testi{/g} geçerse etki ortadan kalkar.

languages.text: 该生物作为特拉金的盟友行动。在其每个{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束时，必须通过一项{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}。若检定成功，则移除此效果。
languages.original_text: This creature acts as Trazyn's ally. At the end of every one of its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g}, it must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g}. On a successful test, the effect is removed.

traits.locale_text: 该生物作为特拉金的盟友行动。在其每个{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束时，必须通过一项{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}。若{g|Encyclopedia:Test}检定{/g}成功，则移除此效果。

languages.text: Esta criatura actúa como aliado de Trazyn. Al final de cada uno de sus {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turnos{/g}, debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Voluntad{/g}. Si supera esta prueba, se suprime el efecto.
languages.original_text: This creature acts as Trazyn's ally. At the end of every one of its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g}, it must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g}. On a successful test, the effect is removed.

traits.locale_text: Esta criatura actúa como aliado de Trazyn. Al final de cada uno de sus {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turnos{/g}, debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Voluntad{/g}. Si supera esta {g|Encyclopedia:Test}prueba{/g}, se suprime el efecto.

languages.text: Diese Kreatur steht Trazyn als Verbündete bei. Am Ende jedes {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} muss sie eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willenskraft{/g} bestehen. Ist die Probe erfolgreich, wird der Effekt entfernt.
languages.original_text: This creature acts as Trazyn's ally. At the end of every one of its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g}, it must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g}. On a successful test, the effect is removed.

traits.locale_text: Diese Kreatur steht Trazyn als Verbündete bei. Am Ende jedes {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} muss sie eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willenskraft{/g} bestehen. Ist die {g|Encyclopedia:Test}Probe{/g} erfolgreich, wird der Effekt entfernt.

languages.text: このクリーチャーはトラズンの味方として行動する。毎ターン終了時に、{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}終了時に、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志力{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抵抗チェック{/g}を行う。成功すれば効果が解除される。
